SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-22-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-22-2023 BY VISITING JUDGE SYLVIA HUSING. PLAINTIFF HAMED AFLAKIAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PRO PARK MOBILITY AT THE CLIFT ROYAL SONESTA HOTEL IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY NOEL DE GUZMAN (VALET MANAGER) WITH WITNESS ALEJANDRO AGUILAR (VALET PARK). DEFENDANT THE CLIFT ROYAL SONESTA HOTEL IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AFLAKIAN, HAMED RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PRO PARK MOBILITY AT THE CLIFT ROYAL SONESTA HOTEL THE CLIFT ROYAL SONESTA HOTEL $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $245.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,245.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
